notes: Model identification: after one no-op turn the dashboard shows ModelName = the running model string (NOT 'unknown'). antigravity carries the model in the transcript JSONL the daemon tails: the parser harvests it from the <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> block (userSettingsModelRe) and attaches it to assistant events, so SessionMetrics.ModelName is populated and ContextWindow falls out of the capacity table for the resolved model. The phase DSL asserts the basic-turn arc; the model observation is left PROVISIONAL (no doc-pin) for record to fill from the recording. cost/tokens observations are intentionally OMITTED — antigravity usage lives only in the SQLite protobuf store (no MetricsReader), so this cell does not assert them. driver=gap:wait_turn: record must port the turn-done poll before driving.

text: Session appears in ready shortly after launch (first phase anchored UNPINNED to start so a transient proc-<PID> presession can't steal birth)

Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName is the running model string (not 'unknown'), harvested from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>; ContextWindow > 0 for the resolved model; state never entered waiting
